en: Brand, contact, social profile, and Schema.org identity settings now live in the Website tab so global site facts are edited in one place.
mt: Is-settings tal-marka, il-kuntatt, il-profil soċjali u l-identità ta’ Schema.org issa jgħixu fit-tab tal-Websajt sabiex il-fatti globali tas-sit jiġu editjati f’post wieħed.

en: JSON defaults are resolved before page-level values. Use field:title, field:summary|truncate:160, custom text, or inherit.
mt: L-inadempjenzi JSON jiġu solvuti qabel il-valuri fil-livell tal-paġna. Uża field:title, field:summary|truncate:160, test personalizzat, jew wiret.

en: Use typed source values like field:title, field:summary|truncate:160, custom text, or inherit.
mt: Uża valuri tas-sors ittajpjati bħal field:title, field:summary|truncate:160, test personalizzat, jew wiret.

en: By default Ichiban only renders tags when your template outputs $page->seo. Automatic injection is opt-in.
mt: B'mod awtomatiku Ichiban jirrendi tags biss meta l-mudell tiegħek joħroġ $page->seo. L-injezzjoni awtomatika hija opt-in.

en: Automatically inject SEO tags into page <head>
Enable only if your templates do not output $page->seo.
mt: Ippermetti biss jekk il-mudelli tiegħek ma joħorġux $page->seo.

en: Optionally format the rendered <title>. Use {meta_title} for the resolved page title, for example {meta_title} | {site_name}. Leave blank to render the title unchanged.
mt: B'għażla ifformattja l- <title> mogħtija. Uża {meta_title} għat-titlu tal-paġna solvut, pereżempju {meta_title} | {site_name}. Ħalli vojt biex tirrendi t-titolu mhux mibdul.

en: Supported placeholders: {meta_title}, {site_name}, {entity_name}, {host}. Title length checks include this format.
mt: Placeholders appoġġjati: {meta_title}, {site_name}, {entity_name}, {host}. Il-kontrolli tat-tul tat-titlu jinkludu dan il-format.

en: Disable this when ProcessWire languages are used internally but the public site should not advertise language alternates.
mt: Iddiżattiva dan meta l-lingwi ProcessWire jintużaw internament iżda s-sit pubbliku m'għandux jirreklama alternanti tal-lingwa.

en: Disable this when templates or another module generate custom structured data.
mt: Iddiżattiva dan meta mudelli jew modulu ieħor jiġġeneraw data strutturata apposta.

en: Verification tags and Meta Pixel are rendered on the home page only. Google Search Console verification is intentionally omitted here because current Google setup should use DNS TXT or CNAME verification.
mt: It-tikketti tal-verifika u l-Meta Pixel huma mogħtija fuq il-paġna ewlenija biss. Il-verifika Google Search Console titħalla barra hawn minħabba li s-setup attwali ta' Google għandha tuża verifika DNS TXT jew CNAME.

en: Microsoft Bing, Yahoo, and DuckDuckGo visibility often starts from Bing Webmaster Tools.
mt: Il-viżibilità ta' Microsoft Bing, Yahoo, u DuckDuckGo spiss tibda minn Bing Webmaster Tools.
Token ta' verifika tad-dominju ta' Pinterest.

en: Numeric Pixel ID. Renders the standard PageView pixel on the home page.
mt: ID tal-pixel numeriku. Jirrendi l-pixel standard PageView fuq il-paġna ewlenija.

en: One per line as meta-name=token. Use for regional tools that provide a meta verification tag.
mt: Wieħed għal kull linja bħala meta-name=token. Uża għal għodod reġjonali li jipprovdu tikketta ta' meta verifika.

en: Example: example-site-verification=abc123. Only simple meta names are rendered.
mt: Eżempju: example-site-verification=abc123. Ismijiet meta sempliċi biss huma mogħtija.

en: Enable the Google Search Console API, create an OAuth Web application client, add this authorized redirect URI: %s, publish the OAuth app to production, then paste the Client ID and Client Secret below. Existing tokens are preserved when settings are saved.
mt: Ippermetti l-Google Search Console API, oħloq klijent ta 'applikazzjoni tal-Web OAuth, żid dan l-URI ta' redirect awtorizzat: %s, ippubblika l-app OAuth għall-produzzjoni, imbagħad waħħal l-ID tal-Klijent u s-Sigriet tal-Klijent hawn taħt. It-tokens eżistenti huma ppreservati meta s-settings jiġu ssejvjati.

en: Access token expired; refresh token is saved.
mt: Token ta' aċċess skada; it-token tal-aġġornament jiġi ffrankat.

en: Enter the Search Console domain, for example lqrs.uk. Ichiban will query it as a Domain property. You can still enter a URL-prefix property like https://example.com/ when needed.
mt: Daħħal id-dominju Search Console, pereżempju lqrs.uk. Ichiban jistaqsiha bħala proprjetà tad-Dominju. Xorta tista' ddaħħal proprjetà ta' prefiss URL bħal https://example.com/ meta meħtieġ.

en: Moz Links API is used by the Backlinks section for inbound links, linking root domains, and anchor text. Use the new Moz API token when possible; legacy Access ID and Secret Key are only a fallback. Start with a small row limit to control monthly usage.
mt: Moz Links API jintuża mit-taqsima Backlinks għal links deħlin, li jgħaqqdu dominji għerq, u test tal-ankra. Uża t-token Moz API il-ġdid meta jkun possibbli; L-ID tal-Aċċess tal-wirt u ċ-Ċavetta Sigrieta huma biss riżerva. Ibda b'limitu ta 'ringiela żgħira biex tikkontrolla l-użu ta' kull xahar.

en: Used by the Backlinks preview tables.
mt: Użat mit-tabelli ta' preview ta' Backlinks.

en: OpenRouter connection used by the Ichiban AI section. This follows the same OpenAI-compatible pattern as the Context module: provider, API key, model, limits, and OpenRouter attribution headers.
mt: Konnessjoni OpenRouter użata mis-sezzjoni Ichiban AI. Dan isegwi l-istess mudell kompatibbli ma' OpenAI bħall-modulu Kuntest: fornitur, ċavetta API, mudell, limiti, u headers ta' attribuzzjoni OpenRouter.

en: OpenRouter format: provider/model, for example anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-6 or openai/gpt-4o-mini.
mt: Format OpenRouter: fornitur/mudell, pereżempju antropiku/claude-sonnet-4-6 jew openai/gpt-4o-mini.

en: You are a helpful SEO assistant for ProcessWire websites.
mt: Inti assistent SEO utli għall-websajts ProcessWire.

en: IndexNow keys are simple verification strings, not keys from an account. Generate one here or use any 8-128 character key containing letters, numbers, and hyphens. A public key file named {key}.txt must exist at the site root and contain the key.
mt: Iċ-ċwievet IndexNow huma strings ta 'verifika sempliċi, mhux ċwievet minn kont. Iġġenera waħda hawn jew uża kwalunkwe ċavetta ta' 8-128 karattru li fiha ittri, numri u sings. Fajl taċ-ċavetta pubblika bl-isem {key}.txt għandu jeżisti fl-għerq tas-sit u jkun fih iċ-ċavetta.

en: Used when Ichiban pings IndexNow after a public page is saved.
mt: Użat meta Ichiban jagħmel ping lil IndexNow wara li paġna pubblika tiġi ssejvjata.

en: Click Save to write/update the public key file if the site root is writable.
mt: Ikklikkja Save biex tikteb/taġġorna l-fajl taċ-ċavetta pubblika jekk l-għerq tas-sit jista’ jinkiteb.

en: Controls canonical, og:url, twitter:url, and hreflang on pages that use ProcessWire URL segments.
mt: Jikkontrolla canonical, og:url, twitter:url, u hreflang fuq paġni li jużaw segmenti ProcessWire URL.

en: Dashboard update checks read GitHub releases and show a full-width banner when a newer Ichiban release exists. Installation is always manual, creates a local backup, and requires the ichiban-manage permission.
mt: Il-kontrolli tal-aġġornament tad-dashboard jaqraw ir-rilaxxi tal-GitHub u juru banner full-wisa 'meta teżisti rilaxx aktar ġdid ta' Ichiban. L-installazzjoni hija dejjem manwali, toħloq backup lokali, u teħtieġ il-permess ta 'ichiban-manage.
Iċċekkja r-rilaxxi ta' GitHub għal aġġornamenti

en: When enabled, the Dashboard banner can download the latest release, back up the current module folder, and replace the module files.
mt: Meta jkun attivat, il-banner Dashboard jista 'tniżżel l-aħħar rilaxx, jagħmel backup tal-folder tal-modulu attwali, u jissostitwixxi l-fajls tal-modulu.

en: Owner/repository used for release checks and downloads.
mt: Sid/repożitorju użat għall-kontrolli tar-rilaxx u t-tniżżil.

en: Public index: %s. Use the Sitemap tab for generation status and manual actions.
mt: Indiċi pubbliku: %s. Uża t-tab Mappa tas-Sit għall-istatus tal-ġenerazzjoni u azzjonijiet manwali.

en: Relative to the ProcessWire web root.
One substring or regex per line.
mt: Substring waħda jew regex għal kull linja.

en: One CSV row per URL: loc,lastmod,changefreq,priority. JSON array is also accepted.
mt: Ringiela CSV waħda għal kull URL: loc,lastmod,changefreq,prijorità. Il-firxa JSON hija aċċettata wkoll.

en: RobotsTxt companion module is installed. Use Setup > Robots.txt for the physical robots.txt editor and presets, or enable Ichiban robots.txt only when you want Ichiban to serve it dynamically. Avoid managing robots.txt in both places at once.
mt: Il-modulu anëillari RobotsTxt huwa installat. Uża Setup > Robots.txt għall-editur u presets fiżiċi robots.txt, jew ppermetti lil Ichiban robots.txt biss meta trid li Ichiban jaqdih b'mod dinamiku. Evita li timmaniġġja robots.txt fiż-żewġ postijiet f'daqqa.

en: Install the companion RobotsTxt module if you want a full physical robots.txt editor with presets, rules overview, file status, and a View file action. Ichiban can still serve a simple dynamic robots.txt when enabled below.
mt: Installa l-modulu RobotsTxt anëillari jekk trid editur fiżiku sħiħ ta' robots.txt b'settijiet minn qabel, ħarsa ġenerali tar-regoli, status tal-fajl, u azzjoni Ara l-fajl. Ichiban xorta jista' jservi robots.txt dinamiku sempliċi meta jkun attivat hawn taħt.

en: Ichiban appends Sitemap automatically when no Sitemap line is present.
mt: Ichiban jehmeż Sitemap awtomatikament meta l-ebda linja Sitemap ma tkun preżenti.

en: Comma-separated template names. Leave empty for all published pages.
mt: Ismijiet tal-mudelli separati b'virgola. Ħalli vojta għall-paġni ppubblikati kollha.

en: One Markdown link or plain URL per line.
mt: Link Markdown wieħed jew URL sempliċi għal kull linja.

en: Use cleanup options carefully on production. Blocked search queries are recorded in the Cleanup log.
mt: Uża għażliet ta 'tindif bir-reqqa fuq il-produzzjoni. Mistoqsijiet ta' tiftix imblukkati huma rreġistrati fir-reġistru tat-Tindif.
Espressjoni regolari waħda għal kull linja.

en: A quick overview of metadata health, crawl cleanup activity, redirects, and recent SEO changes.
mt: Ħarsa ġenerali mgħaġġla tas-saħħa tal-metadata, l-attività tat-tindif tat-tkaxkir, ir-ridirezzjonijiet, u l-bidliet riċenti SEO.

en: Pages that may share poorly on social networks.
mt: Paġni li jistgħu jaqsmu ħażin fuq in-netwerks soċjali.

en: Published pages hidden from search engines.
No redirects have been created yet.
Custom JSON must be a JSON object.
mt: JSON personalizzat għandu jkun oġġett JSON.

en: Global website facts for templates, schema fallbacks, reports, AI prompts, and reusable site templates. Page-level SEO fields still win for individual pages.
mt: Fatti tal-websajt globali għal mudelli, skema fallbacks, rapporti, prompts AI, u mudelli tas-sit li jistgħu jerġgħu jintużaw. L-oqsma SEO fil-livell tal-paġna għadhom jirbħu għal paġni individwali.

en: Update installation is disabled in Ichiban settings.
mt: L-installazzjoni tal-aġġornament hija diżattivata fis-settings tal-Ichiban.

en: Index not built yet. Please run Audit → Rebuild Index first.
mt: Indiċi għadu mhux mibni. Jekk jogħġbok mexxi Verifika → Rebuild Index l-ewwel.

en: Edit meta titles and descriptions across indexed pages without opening each page individually.
mt: Editja meta titli u deskrizzjonijiet fuq paġni indiċjati mingħajr ma tiftaħ kull paġna individwalment.
Li tintwera %1$d-%2$d minn %3$d paġni indiċjati li jaqblu

en: Changes are saved as custom SEO values for each page.
mt: Il-bidliet jiġu ffrankati bħala valuri SEO personalizzati għal kull paġna.

en: No indexed pages match this filter
mt: L-ebda paġni indiċjati ma jaqblu ma' dan il-filtru

en: Review changed fields, then save all visible edits together.
mt: Irrevedi l-oqsma mibdula, imbagħad issalva l-editji viżibbli kollha flimkien.

en: %d submitted pages were skipped because they no longer have an Ichiban SEO field.
mt: Il-paġni sottomessi %d inqabżu minħabba li m'għadx għandhom qasam Ichiban SEO.

en: Index not built yet. Please rebuild the index first.
mt: Indiċi għadu mhux mibni. Jekk jogħġbok ibni mill-ġdid l-indiċi l-ewwel.

en: Every page must have a meta title. Missing titles prevent search engines from identifying page content.
mt: Kull paġna għandu jkollha meta titolu. Titoli neqsin jipprevjenu lill-magni tat-tiftix milli jidentifikaw il-kontenut tal-paġna.

en: Meta title should be 30–70 characters. Too short lacks context; too long gets truncated in search results.
mt: It-titlu tal-meta għandu jkun ta' 30–70 karattru. Qasir wisq nieqes mill-kuntest; twil wisq jiġi maqtugħ fir-riżultati tat-tfittxija.

en: Each page should have a unique meta title. Duplicate titles confuse search engines about which page to rank.
mt: Kull paġna għandu jkollha meta titolu uniku. Titoli duplikati jħawdu l-magni tat-tiftix dwar liema paġna għandhom jikklassifikaw.

en: Meta description should be set on every page. It appears as the snippet in search results and affects click-through rate.
mt: Meta deskrizzjoni għandha tkun issettjata fuq kull paġna. Jidher bħala s-snippet fir-riżultati tat-tfittxija u jaffettwa r-rata tal-ikklikkjar.

en: Meta description should be 50–160 characters. Longer descriptions get cut off in search results.
mt: Meta deskrizzjoni għandha tkun 50–160 karattru. Deskrizzjonijiet itwal jinqatgħu fir-riżultati tat-tfittxija.

en: Each page should have a unique meta description. Duplicates reduce the value of individual pages in search rankings.
mt: Kull paġna għandu jkollha meta deskrizzjoni unika. Duplikati jnaqqsu l-valur ta 'paġni individwali fil-klassifiki tat-tiftix.

en: Open Graph image should be set so shared links look rich on social media.
mt: L-immaġni Open Graph għandha tkun issettjata sabiex il-links kondiviżi jidhru sinjuri fuq il-midja soċjali.

en: Canonical URL must be an absolute URL starting with http. Invalid canonicals can cause indexing issues.
mt: Canonical URL għandu jkun URL assolut li jibda b'http. Kanoniċi invalidi jistgħu jikkawżaw problemi ta' indiċjar.

en: Published pages should not have noindex set unless intentionally hidden from search engines.
mt: Paġni ppubblikati m'għandux ikollhom noindex stabbilit sakemm ma jkunux moħbija intenzjonalment mill-magni tat-tiftix.

en: URLs should use hyphens instead of underscores. Google treats hyphens as word separators, underscores as word joiners.
mt: URLs għandu juża sings minflok underscore. Google tittratta s-sings bħala separaturi tal-kliem, is-sottolinjat bħala kliem li jingħaqdu.

en: Schema.org type should be set to help search engines understand page content and enable rich results.
mt: It-tip Schema.org għandu jkun issettjat biex jgħin lill-magni tat-tiftix jifhmu l-kontenut tal-paġna u jippermettu riżultati sinjuri.

en: Review technical SEO signals, metadata coverage, social sharing readiness, and schema basics across indexed pages.
mt: Irrevedi s-sinjali tekniċi SEO, il-kopertura tal-metadejta, il-prontezza għall-kondiviżjoni soċjali, u l-punti bażiċi tal-iskema fuq il-paġni indiċjati.

en: Rebuild the index after large content, template, or SEO field changes.
mt: Ibni mill-ġdid l-indiċi wara bidliet kbar fil-kontenut, il-mudell jew il-qasam SEO.

en: Manage manual, imported, and automatic redirects from one place.
mt: Immaniġġja redirects manwali, importati u awtomatiċi minn post wieħed.

en: Search by source, target, or note
mt: Fittex minn sors, mira, jew nota

en: Treat From as a regular expression pattern.
mt: Ittratta Minn bħala mudell ta' espressjoni regolari.

en: Allowed types: 301, 302, 307, 410, 451. Use 1 for regex patterns and 0 for plain paths.
mt: Tipi permessi: 301, 302, 307, 410, 451. Uża 1 għal mudelli regex u 0 għal mogħdijiet sempliċi.

en: Created automatically after a page path change.
mt: Maħluq awtomatikament wara bidla fil-passaġġ tal-paġna.

en: Add Google OAuth Client ID and Client Secret in Settings before connecting Search Console.
mt: Żid Google OAuth Klijent ID u Klijent Sigriet f'Settings qabel ma tikkonnettja Search Console.

en: Google Search Console disconnected. Cached Insights and Page Indexing scan data were cleared.
mt: Google Search Console skonnettjat. Cached Insights u dejta tal-iskannjar tal-Indiċjar tal-Paġni ġew ikklerjati.

en: Security token expired. Reload the page and click Disconnect GSC again.
mt: It-token tas-sigurtà skada. Erġa' tagħbija l-paġna u kklikkja Skonnettja GSC mill-ġdid.

en: Checked %d URLs with URL Inspection API.
URL Inspection scan did not return results: %s
mt: URL L-iskannjar tal-ispezzjoni ma rritornax riżultati: %s

en: Security token expired. Reload the page and run Scan indexing issues again.
mt: It-token tas-sigurtà skada. Erġa' tagħbija l-paġna u erġa' agħmel Scan indexing issues.

en: Review Google Search Console performance, page indexing checks, and search breakdowns from cached API data.
mt: Irrevedi l-prestazzjoni ta’ Google Search Console, il-kontrolli tal-indiċjar tal-paġna, u t-tqassim tat-tiftix minn data API fil-cache.

en: Moz quota lookup did not return data.
mt: It-tfittxija tal-kwota Moz ma rritornax dejta.

en: Monitor inbound links, linking domains, and anchor text through the Moz Links API.
mt: Immonitorja r-rabtiet deħlin, dominji li jgħaqqdu, u test tal-ankra permezz taż-Moz Links API.

en: Create or open a Moz API account.
mt: Oħloq jew iftaħ kont Moz API.

en: During signup, Moz asks for a debit or credit card even on the free plan. This is part of their security and abuse-prevention flow.
mt: Waqt l-iskrizzjoni, Moz jitlob għal karta ta 'debitu jew ta' kreditu anke fuq il-pjan b'xejn. Dan huwa parti mill-fluss tas-sigurtà u l-prevenzjoni tal-abbuż tagħhom.

en: Create an API token in the Moz API dashboard.
mt: Oħloq token API fid-dashboard Moz API.

en: Paste the token into the Moz API token field in %s, then save.
mt: Past it-token fil-qasam tat-token Moz API f'%s, imbagħad issalva.

en: Fallback: if token auth does not work for your account, open Show Legacy Credentials for the token and paste the Access ID and Secret Key instead.
mt: Fallback: jekk token auth ma taħdimx għall-kont tiegħek, iftaħ Show Legacy Credentials għat-token u waħħal l-ID ta 'l-Aċċess u ċ-Ċavetta Sigrieta minflok.

en: Return here, keep the default 5-row limit, and click Refresh from Moz. The free plan quota is tiny, so avoid repeated refreshes.
mt: Irritorna hawn, żomm il-limitu default ta’ 5 ringieli, u kklikkja Aġġorna minn Moz. Il-kwota tal-pjan b'xejn hija ċkejkna, għalhekk evita aġġornamenti ripetuti.

en: Ichiban sends the new token as the x-moz-token header. Every refresh is saved as a backlink snapshot and reused from cache on page reload. Default API base URL: https://lsapi.seomoz.com/v2. Change it only if Moz gives you a different endpoint.
mt: Ichiban jibgħat it-token il-ġdid bħala l-header x-moz-token. Kull aġġornament jiġi ffrankat bħala snapshot backlink u jerġa' jintuża mill-cache fuq il-paġna mill-ġdid. Default API bażi URL: https://lsapi.seomoz.com/v2. Ibdelha biss jekk Moz jagħtik endpoint differenti.
L-ebda snapshot tal-kwota għadha ma ġiet salvata

en: Click Refresh quota to save current Moz usage inside Ichiban.
mt: Ikklikkja Aġġorna l-kwota biex issalva l-użu attwali ta' Moz ġewwa Ichiban.

en: Moz credentials are missing. Add your API token, or legacy Access ID and Secret Key, then return to this page to fetch backlink data.
mt: Il-kredenzjali Moz huma neqsin. Żid it-token API tiegħek, jew l-ID tal-Aċċess u ċ-Ċavetta Sigrieta tal-legat, imbagħad erġa' lura għal din il-paġna biex iġġib id-dejta tal-backlink.

en: After connecting, Ichiban will show Search Console metrics for 7, 28, 90, 180, and 365 days, including daily trends, top pages, top queries, countries, devices, search appearance, and cached Page Indexing scans.
mt: Wara l-konnessjoni, Ichiban se juri metriċi Search Console għal 7, 28, 90, 180, u 365 jum, inklużi tendenzi ta 'kuljum, paġni ta' fuq, mistoqsijiet ewlenin, pajjiżi, apparati, dehra ta 'tfittxija, u skans ta' Indiċjar tal-Paġni fil-cache.

en: Enter the exact Search Console property you use. For Domain properties, use only the bare domain, for example lqrs.uk. Ichiban automatically sends it to Google as a sc-domain property. Use https://example.com/ only for URL-prefix properties.
mt: Daħħal il-proprjetà eżatta Search Console li tuża. Għall-proprjetajiet tad-Dominju, uża biss id-dominju vojt, pereżempju lqrs.uk. Ichiban awtomatikament jibgħatha lil Google bħala proprjetà sc-domain. Uża https://example.com/ biss għall-proprjetajiet tal-prefiss URL.

en: Create or choose a Google Cloud project.
mt: Oħloq jew agħżel proġett Google Cloud.

en: Review tracked SEO field changes and restore previous values when a page edit needs to be rolled back.
mt: Irrevedi l-bidliet fil-qasam SEO issegwi u rrestawra l-valuri preċedenti meta editjar tal-paġna jeħtieġ li tiġi rritornata.

en: Enter a valid recipient email address for the test.
mt: Daħħal indirizz elettroniku validu tar-riċevitur għat-test.

en: Test report could not be sent. Check the selected WireMail provider and sender settings.
mt: Ir-rapport tat-test ma setax jintbagħat. Iċċekkja l-fornitur tal-WireMail magħżul u l-issettjar tal-mittent.

en: LazyCron will generate the report as JSON, store the latest snapshot here, and send the same report by email. DOCX export is available for printing or sharing with a client.
mt: LazyCron se jiġġenera r-rapport bħala JSON, jaħżen l-aħħar snapshot hawn, u jibgħat l-istess rapport bl-email. L-esportazzjoni DOCX hija disponibbli għall-istampar jew il-qsim ma 'klijent.

en: Email delivery is enabled in settings.
A short operational digest: current SEO score, new critical issues, pages that need attention, Search Console movement, and indexing warnings from the latest cached scan.
mt: Diġest operattiv qasir: punteġġ attwali SEO, kwistjonijiet kritiċi ġodda, paġni li jeħtieġu attenzjoni, moviment Search Console, u twissijiet ta 'indiċjar mill-aħħar skanjar fil-cache.

en: A broader trend summary: score change, issue totals, top winning and losing pages, query visibility, cleanup activity, redirect hits, and recommendations for the next month.
mt: Sommarju tat-tendenza usa ': bidla fil-punteġġ, totali tal-ħruġ, l-aqwa paġni rebbieħa u telliefa, viżibilità tal-mistoqsijiet, attività ta' tindif, hits ta' direzzjoni ġdida, u rakkomandazzjonijiet għax-xahar li jmiss.

en: SEO health score and critical audit issues
mt: Punteġġ tas-saħħa SEO u kwistjonijiet kritiċi tal-awditjar

en: Missing titles, descriptions, OG images, and noindex pages
mt: Titoli nieqsa, deskrizzjonijiet, immaġini OG, u paġni noindex

en: Search Console clicks, impressions, CTR, and average position
mt: Search Console klikks, impressjonijiet, CTR, u pożizzjoni medja

en: Top pages, top queries, countries, devices, and search appearance
mt: L-aqwa paġni, l-aqwa mistoqsijiet, il-pajjiżi, it-tagħmir, u d-dehra tat-tfittxija
Kwistjonijiet ta' skannjar tal-kampjuni ta' indiċjar tal-paġna

en: Recent redirects, cleanup blocks, and SEO revisions
mt: Ridirezzjonijiet riċenti, blokki ta 'tindif, u reviżjonijiet SEO

en: No report JSON has been generated yet.
mt: L-ebda rapport JSON għadu ma ġie ġġenerat.

en: Save your settings first, then test. The email is sent through the currently selected WireMail provider.
mt: Issejvja s-settings tiegħek l-ewwel, imbagħad ittestja. L-email tintbagħat permezz tal-fornitur WireMail magħżul bħalissa.

en: PHP ZipArchive extension is required to generate DOCX reports.
mt: L-estensjoni PHP ZipArchive hija meħtieġa biex tiġġenera rapporti DOCX.

en: Cleanup log table is not available yet.
mt: It-tabella tar-reġistru tat-tindif għadha mhix disponibbli.

en: Monitor spam search queries and lightweight crawl-surface cleanup that keeps low-value URLs out of public search paths.
mt: Immonitorja l-mistoqsijiet ta’ tfittxija tal-ispam u t-tindif ħafif tal-wiċċ tat-tkaxkir li jżomm lil URLs ta’ valur baxx barra mill-mogħdijiet ta’ tfittxija pubblika.
S'issa l-ebda mistoqsija imblukkata ma illoggjat
Fajl(i) tal-mappa tas-sit %d iġġenerat(i), %s URLs f'% .2fs.

en: Generate and inspect the XML sitemap files served by Ichiban.
mt: Iġġenera u spezzjona l-fajls tal-map tas-sit XML moqdija minn Ichiban.

en: Sitemap auto-regeneration is enabled, but LazyCron is not installed. Install the core LazyCron module or use Generate Now manually.
mt: Ir-riġenerazzjoni awtomatika tal-map tas-sit hija attivata, iżda LazyCron mhux installat. Installa l-modulu ċentrali LazyCron jew uża Iġġenera Issa manwalment.

en: The sitemap directory does not exist yet.
mt: Id-direttorju tal-mappa tas-sit għadu ma jeżistix.

en: The sitemap directory is not writable.
mt: Id-direttorju tal-mappa tas-sit ma jistax jinkiteb.

en: Repaired duplicate Ichiban fields. Kept %s, removed %s from %d template(s), copied %d row(s). Backups: %s.
mt: Imsewwi oqsma Ichiban duplikati. Żamm %s, neħħa %s minn mudell(i) %d, ikkupjat ringiela(i) %d. Backups: %s.

en: Converted field %s. Backup table: %s. Rows migrated: %d.
mt: Qasam konvertit %s. Tabella ta 'backup: %s. Ringieli emigrati: %d.

en: Convert existing SeoMaestro fields to Ichiban without deleting the field or losing per-page SEO data.
mt: Ikkonverti oqsma SeoMaestro eżistenti għal Ichiban mingħajr ma tħassar il-qasam jew titlef id-dejta SEO għal kull paġna.

en: FieldtypeIchiban is not installed yet. Install it from Modules before running a migration.
mt: FieldtypeIchiban għadu mhux installat. Installaha minn Moduli qabel ma tmexxi migrazzjoni.

en: Create a backup and convert this field to Ichiban?
mt: Oħloq backup u tikkonverti dan il-qasam għal Ichiban?

en: Field tokens like {title} become Ichiban field sources; custom text stays custom text.
mt: Field tokens bħal {title} isiru sorsi ta 'field Ichiban; test tad-dwana jibqa' test tad-dwana.

en: Field tokens become sources, custom copy is preserved.
mt: It-tokens tal-qasam isiru sorsi, il-kopja tad-dwana tiġi ppreservata.

en: Copied as the page canonical override when it is not inherited.
mt: Ikkupjat bħala l-paġna kanonika override meta ma tintiret.

en: Field tokens become sources for social title output.
mt: It-tokens tal-qasam isiru sorsi għall-output tat-titlu soċjali.

en: Field tokens become sources for social description output.
mt: It-tokens tal-qasam isiru sorsi għall-output tad-deskrizzjoni soċjali.

en: Copied as the selected OG image source. Ichiban resolves image output at render time.
mt: Ikkupjat bħala s-sors tal-immaġni OG magħżul. Ichiban isolvi l-output tal-immaġni fil-ħin tar-rendi.

en: Copied as alternate text for the OG image.
mt: Ikkupjat bħala test alternattiv għall-immaġni OG.

en: Copied when SeoMaestro stored an explicit type.
mt: Ikkupjat meta SeoMaestro ħażen tip espliċitu.

en: Copied as the page Twitter/X card mode.
mt: Ikkopjati bħala l-paġna Twitter/X card mode.

en: Copied as the page creator handle.
Copied only when the value is not inherit.
mt: Ikkupjat biss meta l-valur ma jirtux.

en: Copied only when the value is not inherit; otherwise Ichiban defaults to included.
mt: Ikkupjat biss meta l-valur ma jiret; inkella Ichiban defaults li inklużi.

en: Copied as the page-level sitemap priority.
mt: Ikkupjat bħala l-prijorità tal-mappa tas-sit fil-livell tal-paġna.

en: Copied as the page-level change frequency.
mt: Ikkupjat bħala l-frekwenza tal-bidla fil-livell tal-paġna.
It-tip ta' skema huwa default għal WebPage

en: This site has more than one FieldtypeIchiban field. Ichiban will keep %s as the canonical SEO field and can remove %s from templates after backing up both tables.
mt: Dan is-sit għandu aktar minn qasam FieldtypeIchiban wieħed. Ichiban se jżomm %s bħala l-qasam kanoniku SEO u jista 'jneħħi %s mill-mudelli wara li jsostni ż-żewġ tabelli.

en: Backup both tables, copy missing rows into seo, and remove the duplicate field from templates?
mt: Agħmel backup taż-żewġ tabelli, tikkopja r-ringieli nieqsa fis-seo, u neħħi l-qasam duplikat mill-mudelli?

en: Create Schema.org nodes in a database-backed builder. Pick a type, choose templates, then map schema properties to ProcessWire fields or source expressions.
mt: Oħloq nodi Schema.org f'bennej appoġġjat minn database. Agħżel tip, agħżel mudelli, imbagħad immappja l-proprjetajiet tal-iskema għal oqsma ProcessWire jew espressjonijiet tas-sors.

en: This page will become the AI area for SEO suggestions, metadata drafts, schema help, and report summaries. It uses Context AI Gateway when available, with Ichiban OpenRouter settings as fallback, and attaches exported Context files to test requests.
mt: Din il-paġna se ssir iż-żona AI għal suġġerimenti SEO, abbozzi ta' metadata, għajnuna ta' skema, u sommarji tar-rapporti. Juża Context AI Gateway meta disponibbli, b'settings Ichiban OpenRouter bħala riżerva, u jehmeż fajls Kuntest esportati għat-talbiet tat-test.

en: The provider returned an empty message body. Try another model, increase Max tokens, or reduce the Context files sent with the request.
mt: Il-fornitur irritorna korp vojt tal-messaġġ. Ipprova mudell ieħor, żid it-tokens Max, jew tnaqqas il-fajls tal-Kuntest mibgħuta mat-talba.

en: Find practical SEO fixes from Context data.
mt: Sib soluzzjonijiet prattiċi ta' SEO mid-dejta tal-Kuntest.

en: Using the attached Context export, give me 5 practical SEO improvements for the current site in concise bullets. Mention which pages, templates, or fields you used.
mt: Bl-użu tal-esportazzjoni tal-Kuntest mehmuża, agħtini 5 titjib prattiku SEO għas-sit attwali f'balal konċiż. Semmi liema paġni, mudelli jew oqsma użajt.

en: Draft titles and descriptions for priority pages.
mt: Abbozz ta' titoli u deskrizzjonijiet għal paġni ta' prijorità.

en: Using the attached Context export, choose 5 priority pages or templates that need stronger metadata. For each one, draft an SEO title under 60 characters and a meta description under 155 characters.
mt: Billi tuża l-esportazzjoni tal-Kuntest mehmuża, agħżel 5 paġni ta' prijorità jew mudelli li jeħtieġu metadejta aktar b'saħħitha. Għal kull wieħed, abbozza titolu SEO taħt 60 karattru u meta deskrizzjoni taħt 155 karattru.

en: Using the attached Context export and the existing ProcessWire templates/fields, suggest Schema.org types and field mappings for the most important page templates. Include source fields such as field:title or field:summary when possible.
mt: Billi tuża l-esportazzjoni tal-Kuntest mehmuża u l-mudelli/oqsma ProcessWire eżistenti, tissuġġerixxi tipi Schema.org u mappings tal-kamp għall-mudelli tal-paġna l-aktar importanti. Inkludi oqsma tas-sors bħal field:title jew field:summary meta possibbli.

en: Using the attached Context export, write a concise client-friendly SEO report summary: current site structure, biggest opportunities, risks, and next actions. Keep it suitable for a monthly report.
mt: Billi tuża l-esportazzjoni tal-Kuntest mehmuża, ikteb sommarju tar-rapport SEO konċiż faċli għall-klijent: struttura attwali tas-sit, l-akbar opportunitajiet, riskji u azzjonijiet li jmiss. Żommha adattata għal rapport ta 'kull xahar.

en: Use sources like field:title, field:summary|truncate:160, {legacy_field}, custom text, or empty string.
mt: Uża sorsi bħal field:title, field:summary|truncate:160, {legacy_field}, test personalizzat, jew string vojta.

en: IndexNow key file written to the site root.
mt: Fajl ewlieni IndexNow miktub fl-għerq tas-sit.

en: IndexNow key saved, but the key file could not be written. Create {key}.txt in the site root with the key as file content.
mt: Ċavetta IndexNow salvata, iżda l-fajl taċ-ċavetta ma setax jinkiteb. Oħloq {key}.txt fl-għerq tas-sit biċ-ċavetta bħala kontenut tal-fajl.

en: No duplicate Ichiban fields were found.
mt: Ma nstabu l-ebda qasam Ichiban duplikat.

en: Could not determine which Ichiban fields to repair.
mt: Ma setgħetx tiddetermina liema oqsma Ichiban għandhom isewwi.

en: Field "%s" is not a SeoMaestro field.
Brand identity and default visual assets for templates and metadata helpers.
mt: Identità tad-ditta u assi viżwali default għal mudelli u helpers tal-metadejta.

en: Public contact details that templates and schema hooks can reuse.
mt: Dettalji ta' kuntatt pubbliku li l-mudelli u l-ganċijiet tal-skema jistgħu jerġgħu jużaw.

en: Postal address values for local business sites, footers, and structured data customization.
mt: Valuri tal-indirizz postali għal siti tan-negozju lokali, footers, u customization tad-dejta strutturata.

en: Profile URLs used as sameAs fallbacks when dedicated SEO Identity social fields are empty.
mt: URLs tal-profil użati bħala fallbacks sameAs meta l-oqsma soċjali ddedikati tal-Identità SEO huma vojta.

en: These optional overrides feed the Organization/Person JSON-LD node. Leave them blank to reuse the Website values above.
mt: Dawn l-overrides fakultattivi jalimentaw in-node JSON-LD tal-Organizzazzjoni/Persuna. Ħallihom vojta biex jerġgħu jużaw il-valuri tal-Websajt hawn fuq.

en: Optional JSON object. Keys are available through siteSetting() together with the named fields above.
mt: Oġġett JSON mhux obbligatorju. Iċ-ċwievet huma disponibbli permezz ta' siteSetting() flimkien mal-oqsma msemmija hawn fuq.

en: Use these helpers from templates, hooks, reports, or project code. Custom JSON keys are merged into siteSettings() and can be read with siteSetting().
mt: Uża dawn l-helpers minn mudelli, ganċijiet, rapporti jew kodiċi tal-proġett. Iċ-ċwievet JSON personalizzati jingħaqdu f'siteSettings() u jistgħu jinqraw b'siteSetting().

en: No Search Console rows available yet.
mt: S'issa m'hemmx ringieli Search Console disponibbli.

en: Checks a URL sample with Google URL Inspection API and groups non-indexed / problematic pages by coverage reason. Ichiban first uses Top Pages from Search Console for the last 28 days, then fills the sample with public ProcessWire pages sorted by path. This is a cached site scan, not Google’s full Page indexing aggregate report.
mt: Jiċċekkja kampjun URL ma 'Google URL Spezzjoni API u jiġbor paġni mhux indiċjati / problematiċi skont ir-raġuni tal-kopertura. Ichiban l-ewwel juża l-Paġni ta’ Fuq minn Search Console għall-aħħar 28 jum, imbagħad jimla l-kampjun b’paġni pubbliċi ProcessWire magħżula skont il-mogħdija. Dan huwa skannjar tas-sit fil-cache, mhux ir-rapport sħiħ tal-indiċjar tal-paġna ta’ Google.

en: No indexing scan yet. Click Scan indexing issues to inspect Top Pages from Search Console first, then public ProcessWire pages if more URLs are needed.
mt: S'issa l-ebda skan ta' indiċjar. Ikklikkja Skennja kwistjonijiet ta' indiċjar biex tispezzjona l-Paġni ta' Fuq minn Search Console l-ewwel, imbagħad paġni pubbliċi ProcessWire jekk ikun hemm bżonn aktar URLs.

en: No indexing issues found in the checked URL sample.
mt: L-ebda kwistjoni ta' indiċjar ma nstabet fil-kampjun URL iċċekkjat.

en: Controls the Open Graph object type shared to social networks.
mt: Jikkontrolla t-tip ta 'oġġett Open Graph kondiviż man-netwerks soċjali.

en: Large image cards usually perform better for editorial and marketing pages.
mt: Kards tal-immaġni kbar normalment jaħdmu aħjar għall-paġni editorjali u tal-kummerċjalizzazzjoni.

en: Use a standard Schema.org type or pick one of the custom schemas created in SEO > Schemas.
mt: Uża tip Schema.org standard jew agħżel waħda mill-iskemi tad-dwana maħluqa f'SEO > Skemi.

en: Relative importance within this site. Most pages should stay around 0.5.
mt: Importanza relattiva fi ħdan dan is-sit. Ħafna paġni għandhom jibqgħu madwar 0.5.

en: Crawler hint for how often the content usually changes.
mt: Ħjiel tat-tkaxkir għal kemm-il darba l-kontenut normalment jinbidel.

en: Add a meta description to preview the search result snippet.
mt: Żid meta deskrizzjoni biex tipprevedi s-snippet tar-riżultat tat-tfittxija.

en: AI is not configured. Configure Context AI Gateway or enable Ichiban OpenRouter settings.
mt: AI mhux ikkonfigurat. Ikkonfigura l-Kuntest AI Gateway jew ippermetti l-issettjar Ichiban OpenRouter.

en: PHP cURL extension is required for OpenRouter requests.
mt: L-estensjoni PHP cURL hija meħtieġa għal talbiet OpenRouter.

en: OpenRouter returned no visible text before the output token limit was reached. Increase Max tokens or shorten the Context export sent with the request.
mt: OpenRouter ma rritorna l-ebda test viżibbli qabel ma ntlaħaq il-limitu tat-token tal-output. Żid it-tokens Max jew tqassar l-esportazzjoni tal-Kuntest mibgħuta mat-talba.

en: OpenRouter returned an empty message body. Finish reason: %s. Output tokens: %d.
mt: OpenRouter irritorna korp tal-messaġġ vojt. Finish raġuni: %s. Tokens tal-ħruġ: %d.

en: OpenRouter returned an empty message body with no finish reason. Output tokens: %d.
mt: OpenRouter irritorna korp vojt tal-messaġġ mingħajr ebda raġuni għall-finitura. Tokens tal-ħruġ: %d.
